title: abutilon australiense
intro: Abutilon australiense, also known as the Australian flowering maple, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Abutilon australiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
